summary: Completed full e2e frontend testing of SMPN 4 Kadupandak static landing page + PPDB form. All 14 critical UI flows passed including: home page render with all sections, navbar (logo, links, dropdowns, PPDB CTA), Hero CTAs, smooth-scroll anchor navigation, PPDB form rendering, empty-form validation toast, full happy-path form submission, success screen (nomor pendaftaran in PPDB-YYYY-XXXXX format, copy/WA/Call/Email/back/daftar-lagi buttons), localStorage persistence (key 'ppdb_pendaftar_smpn4kadupandak' with submitted record), WhatsApp deep link with nomor pendaftaran, and 'Kembali ke Beranda' navigation. No backend (static app). No console errors / pageerrors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: PPDB form: NISN accepts non-numeric / arbitrary length input (placeholder says '10 digit NISN' but no pattern/maxLength validation). Consider adding inputMode='numeric' + pattern + length check.
PPDB form: noTelp accepts arbitrary string (e.g. '08123' accepted). Consider phone format validation.
PPDB form: email field type='email' but server-side/client-side check on submit doesn't validate format because field is optional — OK, but if entered, malformed values are silently accepted.
Hero uses 88vh min-height 640px which may cause overflow issues on very tall narrow viewports; acceptable for the design.
ADMIN_WA number (6282260101234) is hardcoded in PPDB.jsx; consider moving to siteData.js alongside SCHOOL constants for consistency.
localStorage write is unbounded — repeated submissions on the same browser will keep growing the array. Acceptable for static landing page but worth documenting.
Hero images are external Pexels/Unsplash URLs without fallback handling (broken-image case not handled). Static URLs are stable enough.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (14/14 critical flows passed; +5 secondary flows: hero CTA, anchor scroll, profil dropdown, daftar lagi reset, all OK)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only React landing page. Home (/) and PPDB (/ppdb) both load cleanly. PPDB form persists submissions to localStorage key 'ppdb_pendaftar_smpn4kadupandak' as array of records. WhatsApp deep link embeds nomor pendaftaran + form data. Navbar dropdown testids follow pattern nav-item-<label-with-dashes-and-&> (e.g. nav-item-visi-&-misi). All sections have HTML ids matching the navbar anchor targets (#home, #about, #sambutan, #programs, #news, #tabs, #agenda, #gallery, #contact). No mocked APIs.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — all happy paths and validation paths working as designed.
